steps.title: Locate the direct fact
steps.content: The text states that El Museo del Barrio is located in New York City, was founded in 1969, and has more than 8,500 objects in its collection.

steps.title: Reject contradictions
steps.content: Choice A contradicts the statement that the museum is in New York City. Choice C contradicts the 1969 founding date. Choice D invents attendance information the passage never gives. The remaining choice restates "more than 8,500 objects" as "over 8,500 objects." The answer is B.
